lore.english:
A UFS scientist and engineer. She is regarded as the greatest genius in UFS history and an expert in weapon development. Her intellect and engineering prowess are widely recognized within the UFS, and she holds the position of Chief Developer for special weapons. However, her tendency to burn through funds like water in the name of research has become a constant headache for the upper ranks of the UFS.

Her combat ability without assistance is actually below that of an average person. Because of this, she secretly built an android named "Pamela Jäger" to support her in both combat and everyday life. She also pilots her custom-built robot, "General Halloween", through which she engages in activities proclaiming herself a champion of justice.

skills.name: [&Color_Orange][&ATK] Aura[-]
skills.description: Increase ATK of Jupiter allies by 45% in Special Ops
skills.description_readable: Increase ATK of Jupiter allies by 45% in Special Ops

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Handgun of Justice![-]
skills.description:
Takes out the gun hidden in the chest and fires at the enemy.
Target hit is [&Restraint]d at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1010102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1010102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Takes out the gun hidden in the chest and fires at the enemy.
Target hit is Immobilized at a 5% chance.
Duration: 2 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Boom and Justice![-]
skills.description:
Places a bomb that explodes under the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1010202]%)[-] [&Burn] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1010202]%[-] chance. Stacks up to 3.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:1010202] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Places a bomb that explodes under the enemy.
Target hit is inflicted with (3.5%) Burn at a 80% chance. Stacks up to 3.
Duration: 3 turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Justice Execution![-]
skills.description: When an enemy dies by an ally attack, the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] fills by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1010301]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1010301]%[-] chance for all allies.
skills.description_readable: When an enemy dies by an ally attack, the Turn Gauge fills by (20%) at a -15% chance for all allies.

skill_data.name: <[&Tbl_UnitWeapon_Name_10101]> [&Tbl_UnitSkill_Name_10103]
skill_data.description: When an enemy is killed by an ally attack, fills the [&Common_Word_Skill_TurnGauge] of the ally with the highest ATK excluding herself by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:1011301]%)[-] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:1011301]%[-] chance.
skill_data.description_readable: When an enemy is killed by an ally attack, fills the Turn Gauge of the ally with the highest ATK excluding herself by (20%) at a -20% chance.
